title: How To Link Spotify To Instagram Notes Quick Solution 2026
description:
Here is the video for How To Link Spotify To Instagram Notes Quick Solution 2026.

So, you might be on Instagram and notice a new feature that allows you to share your Spotify playlist or whatever you're currently listening to directly inside your Instagram Note.

Using this feature is actually very simple.
First, open up your Instagram app.
Once you're on the home screen, swipe to the side until you reach your Messages section.

Next, tap on the “Note” option at the top of the screen.
When you do that, a pop-up will appear with new options.

Now, you’ll see a “Music” icon—go ahead and tap on that.
This will bring up a panel with several options. At the top, you'll see something like “Link Spotify” — this is what you need to tap to connect your Spotify account.

After tapping “Link Spotify”, another pop-up will appear. Click “Open”, and it will take you to the Spotify app.
Sometimes it might crash or glitch—if that happens, don’t worry. Just try again by tapping “Link Spotify” one more time.

Once it opens successfully, Instagram will ask for permission to view your Spotify account data and listening activity.
Click “Agree”, and from there, Instagram will be able to show your currently playing songs inside your Note.

Once your Spotify is linked to Instagram, you can also integrate music into your bio, share tracks in your Stories, add Spotify music to your Reels, and even include them in regular posts or your account highlights. This creates a more engaging and personalized experience for your followers.

And that’s it—that’s how you link Spotify to your Instagram Notes. It’s a really straightforward process!

If you have any thoughts or questions, feel free to drop them in the comments below.
Hit the like button if this helped you, and more importantly, subscribe for more helpful videos.

I appreciate every single one of you—hope to see you in the next video.
Peace out till then!
And don’t forget to watch the next video to learn more cool ways to use Spotify with Instagram!

Hashtags:
#Instagram #InstagramNotes #InstagramMusic #InstagramNotesMusic #AddMusicToInstagramNotes #PutMusicOnInstagramNotes #SpotifyToInstagram #LinkSpotifyToInstagram #SpotifyInstagramNotes #InstagramNotesFeature #InstagramNotesNotShowing #InstagramNotesMusicFix #InstagramFeature2026 #InstagramHowTo #InstagramTipsAndTricks

title: How to Bulk Edit Prices in Shopify, Decrease or Increase by a Percentage on All Products Easily 2026
description:
In this video I have shown How to Bulk Edit Prices in Shopify, Decrease or Increase by a Percentage on All Products Easily 2026. If you are running a Shopify store, changing product prices one by one can be time-consuming and frustrating. Luckily, Shopify makes it easy to bulk edit product prices so you can quickly apply discounts, increase prices, or adjust margins across your entire store.

This tutorial covers step by step how to use the Shopify bulk editor and third-party apps like Bulk Price Editor, Easy by Bulk Editing, or Hextom to automatically adjust prices. Whether you want to increase all prices by 10%, decrease them by 20%, or set custom price rules, you’ll see exactly how to do it without editing products manually.

This method is perfect for running sales, flash promotions, or adjusting pricing after supplier cost changes. You can also use percentage-based changes to ensure your margins remain consistent. I’ll also show you how to test the edits safely before publishing them to your live store, so you don’t make mistakes that could cost sales.

By the end of this video, you’ll know how to:

Bulk edit Shopify product prices directly in the admin panel.

Use a bulk price editor app to quickly apply percentage changes.

Schedule price changes for upcoming sales.

Save time and automate your pricing strategy in 2026.

If you are looking for a Shopify price editor app that works reliably and is free or low-cost, I’ll share the best recommendations.
